title: Yala Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Yala with a Z-Score of +3.43. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Yala has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a CDD of 11.0 GG and no heating degree days. 
 The relative humidity is 76% and the wind speed is 7.2 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
